recommendations.title: The Pallbearer

recommendations.title: Match Point
recommendations.overview: Chris, a former tennis pro, takes a job as an instructor and befriends his wealthy young student, Tom. After being introduced to his family, Chris is soon engaged to Tom's sister, Chloe. Despite the professional and financial advantages that this rel

recommendations.title: Palm Springs
recommendations.overview: When carefree Nyles and reluctant maid of honor Sarah have a chance encounter at a Palm Springs wedding, things get complicated when they find themselves unable to escape the venue, themselves, or each other.

recommendations.title: The Five-Year Engagement
recommendations.overview: Exactly one year after Tom meets Violet, he surprises her with a wedding ring. By all accounts, Tom and Violet are destined for their happily ever after. However, this engaged couple just keep getting tripped up on the long walk down the aisle.

recommendations.title: My Policeman
recommendations.overview: In the late 1990s, the arrival of elderly invalid Patrick into Marion and Tom’s home triggers the exploration of seismic events from 40 years previous: the passionate relationship between Tom and Patrick at a time when homosexuality was illegal.

recommendations.title: Purple Noon
recommendations.overview: Tom Ripley is a talented mimic, moocher, forger and all-around criminal improviser; but there's more to Tom Ripley than even he can guess.

recommendations.title: Just Say Yes
recommendations.overview: Incurable romantic Lotte finds her life upended when her plans for a picture-perfect wedding unravel -- just as her self-absorbed sister gets engaged.
recommendations.director: Aram van de Rest, Appie Boudellah

recommendations.title: Hannah Gadsby: Nanette
recommendations.overview: The Australian comedian Hannah Gadsby is taking an anti-comedy stance in her newest special.

recommendations.title: Shotgun Wedding

recommendations.title: Tyrannosaur
